summary: The diff implements a substantial portion of all four requirements. REQ-1 (Tutorial Mode), REQ-2 (New Enemy Types), REQ-3 (Progressive Levels), and REQ-4 (Mode Select Screen) are all structurally present. However, several specific acceptance criteria are either not evidenced in the truncated diff or are partially missing, particularly around tutorial step completion validation, the 'completing tutorial transitions to first level' behavior, ground-to-air turret specific ground-placement/low-altitude detection logic, localStorage persistence for level progress/unlock state, and the level-fail condition for time-limited objectives.

missing_requirements.requirement: The tutorial only advances to the next step after the player successfully performs the required action (not just a skip/manual advance).
missing_requirements.reason: The F19TutorialOverlay shows a SKIP button and step indicators, but no evidence in the diff shows that tutorial step advancement is gated on actual player input detection (e.g., detecting movement keypresses, a shot fired, a flare deployed). The hook logic is truncated so this cannot be confirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Completing the tutorial transitions the player to the first progressive level.
missing_requirements.reason: No explicit transition from tutorial completion to level 1 is evidenced in the diff. The overlay has an onExit callback but no onProceedToLevel or equivalent. The page integration is truncated.

missing_requirements.requirement: Ground-to-air turrets are placed on terrain and fire projectiles upward at the player when within range (low-altitude detection).
missing_requirements.reason: A GroundTurretEnemy mesh is referenced in F19EnemyTargets.tsx (truncated), but the firing logic gated on player altitude and range cannot be confirmed from the truncated hook diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: All level progress and unlock state must be persisted to localStorage.
missing_requirements.reason: The hook and page are both truncated. No explicit localStorage.setItem/getItem calls for level unlock state or best scores are visible in the shown diff sections, though the constraint explicitly requires this.

missing_requirements.requirement: A level-fail screen appears when the player fails to meet a time-limited objective (not just on crash), with a retry button.
missing_requirements.reason: F19LevelFailedOverlay exists and has a retry button, but the time-limit fail trigger logic is in the truncated hook. It cannot be confirmed that time expiry separate from player crash triggers the fail screen.

hallucinated_features.description: A 'PILOT TIP' section in the level-failed overlay that dynamically shows context-sensitive tips based on fail reason string matching (missile, carrier, time keywords).
hallucinated_features.reason: This contextual tip system was not specified in the build request or acceptance criteria.

hallucinated_features.description: A 'THREAT ASSESSMENT' section in the level-start overlay showing enemy count and types.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only requires objectives display at level start. A separate threat assessment panel was not specified.
